div.head: The Canadian Minister (Massey) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Sir: I have the honour to refer to your note of August 29th, 1929, concerning the proposed reciprocal arrangement between the United States and Canada for the admission of civil aircraft, the issuance of pilots’ licenses, and the acceptance of certificates of airworthiness for aircraft imported as merchandise. I have been instructed to inform you that His Majesty’s Government in Canada concur in the terms of the agreement as set forth in your note, and will, therefore, consider it to be operative from this date.
